title: README FIX-3 — Biology section ↔ HEXA-NANOBOT / Synbio / AI bidirectional cross-link
scope: Biology section had zero cross-references (INC-5 from cycle 3 README curation) while all other 12 sections had cross-link pattern. Add 3 bidirectional cross-links between Biology HEXA-WEAVE row and (1) Frontier HEXA-NANOBOT, (2) Tech & Industry Synthetic Biology, (3) AI/ML Next-Gen 8-Paradigm Blowup (medical paradigm).

selected.rationale: Both are molecular-scale designed agents under n6 invariants. HEXA-WEAVE designs multi-strand molecular composition; HEXA-NANOBOT is a therapeutic nano-machine operating at the same molecular scale (kidney 6nm gateway, (sigma-phi)^2=100 nano hub). Direct peer relationship — molecular design write-side.

Synbio has Cas{9,12,13}/PAM/gRNA/codon — these are write-side molecular biology primitives at the genome encoding layer. HEXA-WEAVE is write-side at the protein/strand-set composition layer. Direct vertical pair: Synbio (DNA/RNA write-side) ↔ HEXA-WEAVE (protein-strand write-side).

selected.rationale_honest: AI section has no AlphaFold-class entry as a top-level row. The 'medical' paradigm token in the 8-paradigm row is the closest natural anchor since HEXA-WEAVE is explicitly described as 'write-side counterpart to AlphaFold 3 (DeepMind 2024-05 read-side) and IsoDDE (Isomorphic Labs 2026-02 closed)'. raw 91 C3 honest: this is the *least natural* of the 3 cross-links — the AI section catalog focuses on chip/efficiency techniques and does not currently host AlphaFold itself as a tracked product. The cross-link is justified because AlphaFold 3 is named verbatim in the HEXA-WEAVE description, but the AI side is forced (medical 8-paradigm hook is the only natural attachment surface).

rejected_candidates.Frontier_section_as_whole: selected via HEXA-NANOBOT row instead — more specific anchor
rejected_candidates.Materials: HEXA-WEAVE proteins are arguably 'biomaterials' but the materials section catalog is industrial (semiconductor / polymer / concrete) — no natural row attaches to molecular composition. Rejected as too forced.
rejected_candidates.Frontier_per_se: covered via HEXA-NANOBOT row — section header anchor is too coarse

patch_pattern.anchor_convention: GitHub markdown lowercase + emoji-prefix-dash + space-to-dash + ampersand-stripped + parens-stripped

edits.appended_to_core_cell: Cross-link: see also [HEXA-NANOBOT](#-frontier-discoveries-next-gen-rt-sc-tech) (molecular nano-agent peer) · [Synthetic Biology](#-tech--industry) (Cas/codon write-side peer) · [AI/ML](#-ai--ml) (AlphaFold 3 read-side counterpart).
Cross-link: see also [HEXA-WEAVE](#-biology) (Biology — molecular design write-side peer).
Cross-link: see also [HEXA-WEAVE](#-biology) (Biology — multi-strand molecular composition peer).
Cross-link: medical paradigm — see also [HEXA-WEAVE](#-biology) (Biology — n6 write-side counterpart to AlphaFold 3 / IsoDDE read-side AI).

Cross-links appended to Core column body of data rows only.
verification.biology_schema_consistency: VERIFIED — Biology section schema (single-row table | 🛸 | Closure | ver | Product | Core | Link |) preserved. Cross-link added to Core cell, not as new row/column.

Other 9 sections (Fusion, Chip, Energy, Environment, Materials, Robotics, Physics, Software, Display, Audio, Safety, Play, Aerospace, etc.) untouched.

honest_disclosure_raw_91_C3.forced_cross_link_detail: AI/ML ↔ HEXA-WEAVE link is forced. The AI/ML section catalog tracks chip/efficiency techniques, not biomedical AI products. HEXA-WEAVE references AlphaFold 3 (DeepMind) verbatim, but AlphaFold itself is not a tracked product in the AI/ML section table. The 'medical' token inside the 8-paradigm row is the only attachment surface — it is technically valid (HEXA-WEAVE addresses molecular medicine) but not a peer-row pairing the way HEXA-NANOBOT and Synbio are.
honest_disclosure_raw_91_C3.alternative_considered_and_rejected: Could have skipped AI cross-link entirely and stopped at 2 cross-links — but task spec required 3 bidirectional cross-links. Could have routed to Materials section (proteins-as-biomaterials) but Materials section catalog is industrial polymer/ceramic only — equally forced. AI 8-paradigm 'medical' token chosen as the least-bad option per task constraint.

deliverables.cross_link_directions: 1 outgoing from Biology HEXA-WEAVE (3 targets in single cell) + 3 incoming back-links from HEXA-NANOBOT/Synbio/AI-8paradigm to Biology
